About This Property

Shop-cum-office plots in Pine Wood Centre, the dedicated commercial hub of Emaar's Mohali Hills township in Sector 108. Each plot permits a basement plus ground and three floors (approx. 4,140 sq. ft. of built-up potential), fronting the 200-ft wide Landran–Banur highway with the international airport around ten minutes away. The centre is planned with parking for over 600 cars, and sits within Emaar's 3,000-acre master-planned community — right beside our own office at Thakral Towers, so every site visit is personally conducted.

Key Features

◈Emaar Master-Planned Township
◈B + G + 3 Floors Permitted
◈200-Ft Highway Frontage
◈10 Minutes from Airport
◈Parking for 600+ Cars
◈Clear Title, Registry Ready
